## Traceability Decision

- Decision: `Pass / Fail / Pass with findings`
- Findings: `<list findings, or "None">`

<!-- Pass: all requirements have linked components and tests, no unjustified orphan changes. -->
<!-- Fail: one or more requirements have no test, or an unexplained orphan change exists. -->
<!-- Pass with findings: minor gaps acknowledged and accepted. -->
